rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §39.0532, which governs reporting of local student engagement and workforce development indicators. No overlap in subject matter or operative provisions.
quote: The agency shall collect for reporting purposes only information provided by school districts and open-enrollment charter schools under Subsection (b) regarding local indicators of student engagement and workforce development.
_note: No conflict; the rule text addresses school accountability reporting and has no connection to property tax homestead exemptions.
